miscData.activateScheduledScorersDescription: Swap out players in active slots who are not scheduled to play with those from the bench (or injury slot if not injured) who are.
illegalRosterMsgsText: Burger, Jake is set to the position 3B, at which he is no longer eligible.
Tauchman, Mike is set to the position CF, at which he is no longer eligible.
Kiner-Falefa, Isiah is set to the position OF, at which he is no longer eligible.
Wallner, Matt is set to the position LF, at which he is no longer eligible.
miscData.illegalRosterMsgsTitle: This Team roster for this lineup period is illegal. This Team will not accumulate any stats for this lineup period.

cells.name: Saves -- When the pitcher enters a game where his team is leading, finishes the game without surrendering the lead, is not the winning pitcher, and either (a) the lead was 3 runs or less when the pitcher entered the game; (b) the potential tying run was on base, at bat, or on deck; or (c) the pitcher pitched three or more innings.
Holds -- When a pitcher enters a game in a save situation, records at least one out, does not surrender the lead, and does not complete the game.
WHIP Ratio -- (Walks Allowed + Hits Allowed) / Innings Pitched
